ip_outcome_note: Card name explicitly includes 'Recoome' and 'Ginyu Force'. Vision describes a large muscular humanoid with bright reddish-orange hair, beady eyes, white-and-orange Ginyu Force battle armor, smug confident expression — all matching Recoome's canonical visual design (reddish-orange swept-back hair, white armor, bulky build). Verified: Recoome (Dragon Ball Z, Ginyu Force).

trivia_bullets.text: Recoome is one of five members of the Ginyu Force (Captain Ginyu, Guldo, Burter, Jeice, Recoome) — Frieza's elite mercenary squad dispatched to Namek during the Namek Saga of Dragon Ball Z. The Ginyu Force's naming convention is a dairy pun: Recoome derives from 'creme,' Burter from 'butter,' Jeice from 'cheese,' Guldo from 'yogurt,' and Ginyu from the Japanese word for milk [WebSearch: Ginyu Force naming, Dragon Ball Wiki via WebSearch].
sources: WebSearch: Ginyu Force naming conventions (multiple sources)

trivia_bullets.text: Recoome is characterized as the Ginyu Force's most flamboyant member — he poses in battle more often than Captain Ginyu himself and is described as a dim-witted bully who enjoys toying with opponents. Despite the goofy exterior he is considered the second-strongest member after Ginyu. He originated his battle poses from childhood dance training [Dragon Ball Official Site: Weekly Character Showcase no. 79, Recoome; WebSearch snippet].
sources: Dragon Ball Official Site: Weekly Character Showcase #79 Recoome
WebSearch: CBR Recoome Ginyu Force article

trivia_bullets.text: BT1-096 is a Common card from Galactic Battle (BT1). The Ginyu Force as a named cohort appears across multiple BT1 cards — the set's Frieza archetype was the other major launch deck alongside Broly, with Ginyu Force members serving as support Battle cards [PSA Set Registry article on Galactic Battle 2017].

Recoome was killed on Namek twice: once by Vegeta (energy wave) and then by Goku (single punch). His first defeat by Goku — a single hit to the midsection that knocked him unconscious — became one of the series' defining power-scaling moments and a frequently referenced meme for fan discussions about relative power levels [WebSearch: CBR 'Recoome is Dragon Ball Z's Scariest Ginyu Force Member'].
sources: WebSearch: CBR article 'Recoome is Dragon Ball Z's Scariest Ginyu Force Member Thanks to Untapped Potential'
